findings.description: The knowledge file's table for selectタグ attributes adds a '型' (type) column with values 'boolean' (withNoneOption) and 'string' (noneOptionLabel), and a '必須' column with blank values. The source table has only two columns (属性 and 説明); types and required-flag are not explicitly stated in the source.
findings.source_evidence: Source table columns: 属性 / 説明 only. No type or required columns present.
